Requirement Description: Ability to apply customer prepayments to Sales Orders before fulfillment
Solution Description: Enable Customer Deposits feature under Accounting Preferences

Requirement Description: Custom invoice PDF with subsidiary logo selected conditionally based on subsidiary on the transaction
Solution Description: Advanced PDF/HTML Template with conditional logo logic using ${record.subsidiary}

Requirement Description: Auto-approve Sales Orders under $500 without manager sign-off
Solution Description: SuiteFlow Workflow on Sales Order: IF Amount < 500 THEN set Approval Status = Approved

Requirement Description: Nightly commission calculation based on tiered rates per product category
Solution Description: Scheduled SuiteScript 2.1 Map/Reduce — runs daily at 02:00 UTC; writes to Commission Calculation custom record

Requirement Description: Real-time two-way sync with Salesforce CRM for Opportunity and Customer data
Solution Description: RESTlet integration — Salesforce calls NetSuite on Opportunity Close Won; NetSuite pushes Invoice status back

Requirement Description: Automated 3-way PO matching (PO vs. Receipt vs. Vendor Bill)
Solution Description: Enable Advanced Receiving and 3-Way Match feature under Accounting Preferences

Requirement Description: Vendor Bill approval workflow with dual-approval for bills over $10000
Solution Description: SuiteFlow Workflow on Vendor Bill: single approver under $10K; dual approver at or above $10K

Requirement Description: Import vendor invoices from EDI file drop on SFTP server
Solution Description: Scheduled SuiteScript reads SFTP; parses EDI 810; creates Vendor Bills via record.create

Requirement Description: Multi-currency GL with automatic exchange rate revaluation at month-end
Solution Description: Enable Multi-Currency and Currency Revaluation features; configure exchange rate provider

Requirement Description: Intercompany elimination entries auto-generated at consolidation close
Solution Description: Scheduled Map/Reduce script: queries intercompany transactions per period; auto-generates elimination JE
